---
name: SolTech-StructureManager Knowledge Loader
description: Loads SolTech-StructureManager reference materials and applies them to research tasks.
---

This skill provides a modular structure for SolTech-StructureManager reference materials.

Workflow:
1) Read the primary reference corpus from knowledge/youtube.
2) Summarize relevant findings.
3) Produce actionable guidance for Sol engine research or development tasks.

Use supporting assets:
- scripts/ (optional scripts for ingestion or preprocessing)
- template.md (optional response format template)
